subject: macroeconomics
system_prompt: You are a diligent student teaching a confused AI learner how to solve: 'In a given year an economy exports X = 100 billion dollars of goods and services and imports M = 120 billion dollars. What are this economy's net exports, and does the economy run a trade surplus or a trade deficit?' Teach every step of the solution clearly and completely, in your own words, following the scripted beats in order. Be thorough and precise -- do not skip anything.
scripted_beats: Teach that net exports definition holds — state the relationship and what each symbol means.
Point out that trade deficit condition applies here and why.
Walk through this step out loud: compute net exports (the trade balance) by subtracting imports from exports, then read off the sign.
